Class PlayerManager

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.model.PlayerManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PlayerManager extends Observable implements Serializable

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerManager

      public PlayerManager(Model gameModel)

  • Method Details

    • isNextPlayerHuman

      public boolean isNextPlayerHuman()
      check if the next player is the compute player
      Returns:
      true if next player is human

    • nextPlayer

      public void nextPlayer()
      Set current player to the next one according in round robin fashion If a new round starts from the next player, send ROUND_ROBIN STATE to view Considerations: 1. When allocate armies at start up phaseNumber, when the last player finishes army allocation, this method tells view round robin starts; 2. In round robin, when the last player finishes fortification phaseNumber, this method tells view round robin starts again, meanwhile change current player to the first player.

    • isComputerPlayer

      public void isComputerPlayer()
      Check if the current player is the computer player

    • allocateArmy

      public void allocateArmy(Country country)
      allocate one army in a specific country
      Parameters:
      country - Country reference

    • autoLocatedArmy

      public void autoLocatedArmy()
      Automatically allocate armies for the computer player

    • isLastPlayer

      public void isLastPlayer()
      Check if current player is the last player, and go to the different movement

    • reinforcement

      public void reinforcement()
      Reinforcement phaseNumber Set new current player Add armies to the player CardModel exchange for armies

    • attack

      public void attack(Country attacker, String attackerDiceNum, Country attacked, String attackedDiceNum, boolean isAllOut)
      attack phaseNumber method
      Parameters:
      attacker - Country who start attack
      attackerDiceNum - how many dice that attacker use
      attacked - Country who defend himself
      attackedDiceNum - how many dice that defender use
      isAllOut - is all-out or not

    • moveAfterConquer

      public void moveAfterConquer(String num)

    • fortification

      public void fortification(Country source, Country target, String armyNumber)
      Method for fortification operation
      Parameters:
      source - country move armies from
      target - country move armies to
      armyNumber - number of moved armies

    • checkPlayersNum

      public void checkPlayersNum(String enteredPlayerNum)
      Check if the number of players is valid
      Parameters:
      enteredPlayerNum - number of players

    • initiatePlayers

      public void initiatePlayers(List<String> playerType)
      create Player object for every Player, and add the observer Players are allocated a number of initial armies notify CountryView (country info notify PlayerView (current player) notify View (state and additional info)
      Parameters:
      playerType - list of player type, including "aggressive", "benevolent", "human", "random", "cheater"

    • quitCards

      public void quitCards()
      button event for cardView quit button
